name: nfl_team_seasonlogs_longest_rush range year_offset takes the window MAX
description: longest_rush over a multi-year window is MAX, not the SUM of per-season bests.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT MAX(nfl_team_seasonlogs.longest_rush) FROM nfl_team_seasonlogs WHERE nfl_team_seasonlogs.nfl_team = player.current_nfl_team AND nfl_team_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025) AND nfl_team_seasonlogs.stat_key = 'QB_TOTAL') AS "nfl_team_seasonlogs_longest_rush_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
